name: Classic Round Silver Wall Clock
description: An elegant, minimalist round wall clock featuring a clean white face with bold black numerals and a sleek metallic silver finish frame.
warning: Ensure the wall hook is securely fastened before mounting.

name: Elegant Round Gold Wall Clock
description: Add a touch of sophistication to your interior space with this polished golden-framed round wall clock featuring a sharp analog display.
warning: Keep out of directly humid environments to maintain frame luster.

name: Modern Square Matte Black Wall Clock
description: A stylish square-profile wall clock featuring rounded corners, a deep matte black frame, and accented silver hardware clips on the sides.
warning: Avoid using heavy-duty industrial batteries; standard AA recommended.

name: Traditional Mahogany Round Wall Clock
description: Classic home or office timepiece styled with a rich mahogany brown outer frame enclosing a stark white dial face.
warning: Clean the outer frame using only a dry microfibre cloth.

name: Amaya Multi-Dial Gold Station Clock
description: A dark-faced premium wall clock featuring integrated sub-dials for monitoring environmental diagnostics alongside standard time.
warning: Sub-dials calibrate naturally based on ambient room conditions.

name: Haishi Digital-Display Smart Wall Clock
description: An innovative hybrid clock from Haishi featuring a large analog main face combined with an embedded LCD screen showing month, date, day, and temperature.
warning: Ensure the digital dashboard batteries are replaced promptly to avoid losing synchronization.

name: Luminous Glow-in-the-Dark Wall Clock
description: Perfect for bedrooms and dark corridors, this clock features premium photo-luminescent numerals and hands that glow brilliantly when lights are out.
warning: Requires brief exposure to natural or ambient light during the day to charge the glowing properties.

name: Luxury Skeleton Gear Pendulum Clock
description: A magnificent statement piece featuring a completely open transparent dial, floating rose gold Roman numerals, visible interlocking metallic gears, and an active mechanical swinging pendulum.
warning: Mount securely to a structural wall or stud due to the heavy luxury build configuration.

name: Grand Steampunk Map & Moving Gear Clock
description: The ultimate luxury time art piece. Features an intricate background map texture, high-relief golden numerals, and an expansive center array of rotating open-work mechanical brass gears.
warning: Do not manually obstruct the moving decorative gears to prevent motor strain.

name: Chocolat Traditional Round Wall Clock
description: A simple, deep brown variation of our standard boardroom round clock, emphasizing long-term battery life and straightforward, legible timekeeping.
warning: Ensure correct polarity placement when snapping batteries into the back hub.
